stories.headline: Henry Nowak inquest to probe actions of police, coroner says
stories.description: A full inquest into Henry Nowak's death is scheduled for September 2027 in Winchester.

stories.headline: Is the Lifetime ISA fit for purpose in London?
stories.description: The number of people withdrawing money from a LISA is outpacing the number using one to buy a home. Why?

stories.headline: Ofqual warns over smart device cheating in GCSE and A-level exams
stories.description: Ofqual chief says invigilators are being trained to detect devices like smart glasses and hidden earpieces.

stories.headline: Teenager given life sentence for knife murder of John McNab while on bail for slashing
stories.description: The 17-year-old will serve a minimum of 17 years for killing John McNab, 22, in an unprovoked attack in Leith last year.

stories.headline: Starmer accuses Musk of trying to whip up division over Henry Nowak murder
stories.description: X-owner Musk has posted several times on the site criticising the police treatment of Henry Nowak.
